commands.review_summary:
The PR updates agent context-overflow recovery hints to prefer model metadata, fall back to stored session context tokens, clamp with agent context caps, and adds regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows the hint path can use stored session context tokens before model metadata and compare against an uncapped primary window, and the PR adds focused seam tests for the uncataloged 32k runtime model with a larger agent cap.
